headline: Jim Cramer: This Tech Stock Is A 'Winner', Snap Does Not Have Growth
summary: Jim Cramer discussed various stocks on Mad Money Lightning Round. He expressed concerns about Ondas Inc's losses and praised companies like Halliburton and Nokia.

headline: Why Halliburton (HAL) Is Up 7.0% After Beating Q1 Earnings And Securing New Global Contracts
summary: In the first quarter of 2026, Halliburton Company reported revenue of US$5,402 million and net income of US$461 million, with basic and diluted earnings per share from continuing operations of US$0.55, while also repurchasing about 2.90 million shares for US$100 million as part of its long-running buyback program. Alongside earnings that exceeded analyst expectations, Halliburton highlighted new international contract wins, including a multi‑year agreement with YPF in Argentina and an...
